scripts.testSuite: powershell -Command "git fetch origin gh-pages; if (Test-Path temp-gh-pages) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force temp-gh-pages }; git worktree add temp-gh-pages gh-pages; if (!(Test-Path allure-results/history)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path allure-results/history | Out-Null }; if (Test-Path temp-gh-pages/history) { Copy-Item -Path temp-gh-pages/history/* -Destination allure-results/history/ -Force } else { Write-Host 'No remote history found' }; try { npm run test } finally { npx allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report; git worktree remove temp-gh-pages --force; npm run report:publish }"
